rulings.Case Title: OTIS GLOVER et al VS. CERTAINTEED CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Compliance Hearing (Set By Court At 02/10/14 Hearing Re Plaintiffs' Motion To Compel Pacific Bell Telephone Company To Produce Its Person(S) Most Knowledgeable, Custodian(S) Of Records And Responsive Documents At Deposition And Request For Sanctions)
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, March 5, 2014 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Compliance hearing regarding plaintiffs¿ motion to compel Pacific Bell Telephone Co. to produce its person(s) most knowledgeable, custodian(s) of records and responsive documents at deposition: hearing required. The hearing will be at 9:30a.m., not 9:00a.m. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If any party wishes to have the matter reported, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. There will be only one official record in a case. The designated reporter must be licensed pursuant to Bus. & Prof. Code, Sec. 8016. If the parties are unable to agree on one reporter, the court will designate a qualified court reporter that will provide the official transcript for the matter. The party or parties shall pay for the cost of reporter. = (503/TLJ)
